title: Santhana Malligaiyil Lyrics Rajakaliamman
stanzas:
Santhana malligaiyil
thooli katti potten
thaayi nee kanvalaru
thaalelallelo

veppilai veesikkittu
paattu sollureno
kaettu nee kanvalaru
thaalelallelo

indha ulagai aalum
theeyikku chella
pullai naanirukken

en kavala theerkka
venaamaaa kanvalaru
theeyi.

Santhana malligaiyil
thooli katti potten
thaayi nee kanvalaru
thaalelallelo

paambe thalaiyanaithaan
veppilaiye panju meththa.
aathaa kanvalara aariraaro
paadum pulla.

endha oru pillaikkume
indha varam kedaikkala
aanandhame ponguthammaa
vittu vittu kannula.

Aaayi magamaayi
naan enna koduthuvachen.
padham thirupaadham
adhil nenja eduthuvachen.

Santhana malligaiyil
thooli katti potten
thaayi nee kanvalaru
thaalelallelo

oruvaai unakku
ootti vitta velaiyila
ulagam pasi adangi
uranguthammaa nerathula.

udhattu parukayila
onnu rendu sindhuthadi
atha naan rusi paarthen
mothcham ingu vandhathadi.

theeye ini neeye
en nenjinil thangividu
poogum vazhiyaavum
nee engaludan kooda iru.

Santhana malligaiyil
thooli katti potten
thaayi nee kanvalaru
thaalelallelo

veppilai veesikkittu
paattu sollureno
kaettu nee kanvalaru
thaalelallelo

indha ulagai aalum
theeyikku chella
pullai naanirukken

en kavala theerkka
venaamaaa kanvalaru
theeyi.

Santhana malligaiyil
thooli katti potten
thaayi nee kanvalaru
thaalelallelo

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Santhana Malligaiyil conveys themes of devotion and love, reflecting a deep connection with the divine.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is from the movie Rajakaliamman, which is known for its spiritual themes.

Who is the singer of this song?

The singer of Santhana Malligaiyil is currently unknown.

When was the song released?

The song was released on April 14, 2000.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Santhana Malligaiyil from the movie Rajakaliamman is a beautiful expression of devotion, inviting listeners to immerse themselves in its soothing melodies. It evokes feelings of peace and spirituality, making it perfect for moments of reflection and relaxation. The lyrics speak to a deep connection with the divine, enhancing the song's emotional depth. Overall, it serves as a calming anthem for those seeking solace in their faith.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Santhana Malligaiyil is a mesmerizing devotional track that resonates with the soul, inviting listeners into a serene world of spirituality. The song's soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics create a calming atmosphere, perfect for moments of reflection. Experience the beauty of Rajakaliamman through this enchanting piece that uplifts the spirit.
stanzaMeanings: In the fragrant jasmine, I have tied a thread, mother, you are the one who holds my heart.
With the bitter leaf blowing, is it singing? Listen, you are the one who holds my heart.
In this world, I am a child who has come to serve the fire.
Should I remove my worries? You are the one who holds the fire.
In the fragrant jasmine, I have tied a thread, mother, you are the one who holds my heart.
Oh, the head of the snake is the bitter leaf. Oh mother, the child sings.
No child gets this blessing, happiness flows out of the eyes.
As a mother, I have given everything. I have taken the heart from the foot of the path.
In the fragrant jasmine, I have tied a thread, mother, you are the one who holds my heart.
If you are tied to someone, the world will rest in that work.
In the raised pot, one or two thoughts come, I saw the taste and it came here.
Oh fire, now you are in my heart, let it go, you should stay with us.
In the fragrant jasmine, I have tied a thread, mother, you are the one who holds my heart.
With the bitter leaf blowing, is it singing? Listen, you are the one who holds my heart.
In this world, I am a child who has come to serve the fire.
Should I remove my worries? You are the one who holds the fire.
In the fragrant jasmine, I have tied a thread, mother, you are the one who holds my heart.
